disableDefaultEnvVars.description: Disables the automatic injection of environment variables from the connected resource's properties.

source.description: Resource ID of the source resource for this connection.

bytes.description: Verbatim SVG file content as a UTF-8 string. Populated at resource-type registration time; never edited in the source YAML.

hash.description: Server-computed SHA-256 of `icon.bytes`. Content-addresses the icon for graph responses.

application.description: (Optional) The Radius Application ID. `myApplication.id` for example.

codeReference.description: Optional URI to the source code of this resource type. ex: https://github.com/radius-project/radius/blob/4fab87e8127adf1db6f43b7029d5235fbe82c5c9/cmd/controller/main.go#L27

connections.description: Map of connection name to connection data.

database.description: (Optional) The name of the database. Defaults to `mysql_db` if not provided.

environment.description: (Required) The Radius EnvironmentID. Typically set by the rad CLI. Typically value should be `environment`

host.description: (Read-only) The host name used to connect to the database.

icon.description: Optional icon associated with the resource type, rendered by Radius graph views. Populated at resource-type registration time and by server-side hash computation; deployed resource instances never set it. Marked read-only so it never appears on the Bicep authoring surface for a resource.

port.description: (Read-only) The port number used to connect to the database.

secretName.description: (Required) The name of the secret containing the database credentials.

version.description: (Optional) The major MySQL server version in the X.Y format. Assumed to be 8.4 if not specified.

application.description: (Optional) The Radius Application ID. `myApplication.id` for example.

codeReference.description: Optional URI to the source code of this resource type. ex: https://github.com/radius-project/radius/blob/4fab87e8127adf1db6f43b7029d5235fbe82c5c9/cmd/controller/main.go#L27

database.description: (Optional) The name of the database. Defaults to `mysql_db` if not provided.

environment.description: (Required) The Radius EnvironmentID. Typically set by the rad CLI. Typically value should be `environment`

host.description: (Read-only) The host name used to connect to the database.

icon.description: Optional icon associated with the resource type, rendered by Radius graph views. Populated at resource-type registration time and by server-side hash computation; deployed resource instances never set it. Marked read-only so it never appears on the Bicep authoring surface for a resource.

port.description: (Read-only) The port number used to connect to the database.

secretName.description: (Required) The name of the secret containing the database credentials.

version.description: (Optional) The major MySQL server version in the X.Y format. Assumed to be 8.4 if not specified.
